wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Meat Cleaver|2}}{{R|Meat Cleaver||2}} is an <!-- {{{REFER POINT 3 IF CHARACTER EXCLUSIVE}}} --> [[sts2:Ancients|Ancient]] {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Relic|2}}. <!-- {{{MORE INFORMATION}}} --> This relic gives the Player the option to remove 2 cards from their Deck and gain 9 Max HP at {{2|Rest Sites}}. This relic is only obtainable at the start of Act 3.

== Notes ==

At the start of {{2|Acts|Act}} 3, if the Ancient is {{KW|Tanx||2}}, he has a random chance to offer this relic. This is the only way to acquire it.

== Interactions ==
If the player's deck does not include at least 2 removable cards, Cook cannot be chosen.

=== Synergies ===

* {{R|Miniature Tent||2}} has powerful synergy with any relic that provides additional Rest Site options. When the Player has multiple such relics (eg. {{R|Girya||2}} or {{R|Shovel||2}}), {{R|Miniature Tent||2}} improves further.
* Relics that improve Rest Sites regardless of action (eg. {{R|Eternal Feather||2}} or {{R|Venerable Tea Set||2}}) may make Meat Cleaver more appealing.

=== Anti-Synergies ===

* Other relics that provide additional options at Rest Sites (eg. {{R|Girya||2}} or {{R|Shovel||2}}) tend to lose some value since only one option may be chosen.
* {{C|Forbidden Grimoire||2}} can make the Meat Cleaver's card removal redundant.
